title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Jio Platforms

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Jio Platforms
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Software Engineer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!
